Track 1-Dear: slow but great vocals, kinda sounds like a letter to begin the album. "dear every one i know" @ManchesterOrch
Track 2-Mighty: Starts off strong, feels like geting lost in the forest. "i will do my best to breath for you, yoooou." @ManchesterOrch
3-Pensacola: Light, fast "hope you will see what you have ben turning me in to, its all for you" adore this song, trumpets! @ManchesterOrch
4-April Fool: we have all ben jamin to this for weeks, amazing song cant wait to see it live! "let me go" @ManchesterOrch
"IVE GOT THAT ROCK AND THAT ROLL!!!!!! IVE COME TO SET FIRE TO YOUR BONES!" #aprilfool
5-Pale Black Eye: Feels whimsical and destitute, a man who gave up yet is still pleading. "when we sleep we sleep alone" @ManchesterOrch
6-Virgin: love this song, pounding, yelling. "Kiss him on top his lips and crucify the fire" @ManchesterOrch
7-Simple Math: such a calm, chill song. Have you seen the video? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PaMiVDZu_T4 @ManchesterOrch
"what if i was wrong, and you never questioned it, what if it was true that all we thought was right was wrong?" @ManchesterOrch #simplemath
8-Leave it Alone: Beautiful."if its not with you, ive got no place to go" i though there would be song i dint like, but wow @ManchesterOrch
9-Apprehension: Sounds like andy and his wife lost a child during pregnancy? :( "my apprehension got me no where" such a sad song.
10-Leaky Breaks: wow he is not pulling any punches and just leting all his faults out. Such a real album. #tenoutoften
Bravo @ManchesterOrch complex amazing music and thanks @okayfineAndy for telling us this story. Cant wait to see yall in dallas!
